1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Kristiansand municipality

2.description: get parcels (teig) filtered by kommunenummer for Kristiansand

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons reduced to the municipality extent

4.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced storm-surge polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per teigid

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer from step 1

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) for later spatial reduction

4.description: reduce storm polygons to municipality extent (storm polygons ∩ municipality)

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced 200-year storm polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid (distinct teigid) after spatial join
